title: 6.5ft / 2m Dark Purple Chunky Christmas Tinsel Garland – Wide Shiny Metallic Foil Twist Decoration for Xmas Tree, Holiday Party, Home, Indoor & Outdoor Festive Décor
features: 𝐄𝐲𝐞-𝐂𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬: Add festive sparkle to your celebrations with our chunky tinsel garlands, available in a wide range of vibrant colours including Apple Green, Blue, Pink, Champagne, Emerald Green, Purple, Rose Pink, Dark Purple, Baby Blue, Red, and Burgundy. Perfect for coordinating with any Christmas colour scheme or theme.

𝐖𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐂𝐡𝐮𝐧𝐤𝐲 𝐂𝐡𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐦𝐚𝐬 𝐓𝐢𝐧𝐬𝐞𝐥 𝐆𝐚𝐫𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐝: Each colour features bright, reflective metallic tones that capture the essence of the holiday season. The wide and full design enhances your Christmas décor, creating a warm and joyful festive atmosphere for your home, office, or event.

𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞 & 𝐂𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐠𝐞: Each garland measures 2 metres long and 9cm wide, providing a total of 10 metres of decorative coverage. Perfect for wrapping around Christmas trees, stair railings, mantels, or door frames, offering plenty of material for a complete festive display.

𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐮𝐦 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥: Made from high-quality metallic foil, these garlands are soft, durable, lightweight, and reusable. Their eco-friendly design ensures they are easy to store and use again, making them ideal for sustainable Christmas decorating year after year.

𝐈𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐅𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐃𝐞́𝐜𝐨𝐫: Versatile and stylish, these chunky tinsel garlands can be used to decorate windows, doors, ceilings, walls, staircases, tables, or party backdrops. Perfect for Christmas parties, holiday celebrations, New Year’s Eve, and winter events — adding a touch of glamour and shine to any festive setting.
